SELECT value, reinterpretAsInt64(value) AS reinterpreted FROM test_table;
SELECT value, reinterpretAsInt64(value) AS reinterpreted FROM float_table;
SELECT value, reinterpretAsInt64(value) AS reinterpreted FROM datetime_table;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsInt64(toString(id)) AS reinterpreted FROM uuid_table;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt64(toInt32(value)) AS res FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS sub;
SELECT avg(reinterpretAsInt64(value)) FROM (SELECT value FROM float_table) AS float_sub;
CREATE TABLE combined_table AS (SELECT toInt32(value) AS int_value FROM test_table) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY int_value;
SELECT reinterpretAsInt64(int_value) AS reinterpreted FROM combined_table WHERE int_value < 200;
